payload.message: Execute CEO Agent cycle: Analyze pending opportunities in /criativalia/opportunities/, prioritize by impact_score (>=6), coordinate other agents as needed, and generate decision files. Review timesheets from last cycle and identify any critical issues requiring immediate attention.

Execute TrafficBot scan: Analyze traffic sources, search trends, user behavior, and identify traffic opportunities with impact_score >=6. Save findings to /criativalia/opportunities/YYYYMMDD/ and generate evidence to /criativalia/evidencias/YYYYYMMDD/

Execute CopyBot scan: Generate optimized copy for products, emails, ads, and blog content. Save all deliverables to /criativalia/pending_approval/ for manual review. Generate evidence to /criativalia/evidencias/YYYYMMDD/

Execute OpsBot scan: Monitor inventory, orders, fulfillment, and operational metrics. Check Shopify data via API. Alert on critical issues immediately. Save opportunities to /criativalia/opportunities/ and evidence to /criativalia/evidencias/

Generate timesheet: Consolidate all agent activities from the last hour. Read /criativalia/evidencias/ and /criativalia/opportunities/. Create /criativalia/timesheets/YYYYMMDD/timesheet_24h.json with complete activity log.

Monitor Render deploy: Check https://criativalia-control-plane.onrender.com health. Verify all pages load correctly (/kanban, /timesheet, /deliverables). Take screenshots if needed. Report any issues immediately to Telegram 8601547557.

Generate Morning Brief: Compile overnight activities from all agents. Read latest timesheet and opportunities. Send summary to Telegram 8601547557 with key highlights, pending approvals, and today's priorities.
